calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT LESLEY WILLIAMS' DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Respondent Lesley Williams' demurrer to the "petition for writ of mandate and declaratory and injunctive relief" is sustained with prejudice on jurisdictional grounds. (see word minutes for details)

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
